EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A flow from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} over the {protocol.layer7} protocol is closed. Reason: "{reason}"
A flow from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} over the {protocol.layer7} protocol is closed
A flow from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} over the {protocol} protocol is closed
A flow from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} over the {protocol} protocol is closed. Reason: "{reason}"
